creator: superbofh@gmail.com
text:
after updating into freebsd 9 -stable branch
ezjail fails to run. returns this message:

[root@tank /etc/rc.d]# ./ezjail restart
Stopping jails: cannot stop jail software_tank_deadbsd_org. No jail id in /var/run
 cannot stop jail larry_deadbsd_org. No jail id in /var/run
 cannot stop jail dns_tank_deadbsd_org. No jail id in /var/run
 cannot stop jail althaser_tank_deadbsd_org. No jail id in /var/run
